chunks.title: Assembly of Leaders
chunks.reason: Describes the gathering of military and administrative leaders in Jerusalem.

chunks.title: David's Address on Solomon's Selection
chunks.reason: David explains God's choice of him as king and Solomon to build the temple.

chunks.title: Temple Plans and Materials
chunks.reason: Details the architectural patterns and specific weights of materials given to Solomon.

chunks.title: Final Encouragement and Resources
chunks.reason: David encourages Solomon with God's presence and lists the available workforce.
